overview.description: The iShares iBonds Dec 2035 Term Muni Bond ETF (IBMX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks the investment results of an investment-grade US municipal bonds index expected to mature or be redeemed before December 2035. IBMX was launched on Apr 14, 2026 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: S&P AMT-Free Municipal Series Callable-Adjusted 2035 Index
